hero.subtitle: Euler dictated his greatest works in total blindness. We give you the agentic scribes to do the same in the Age of Intelligence. Liquidate unused compute and master the AI secondary market.

features.label: Infrastructure
features.title: Engineered for Performance
features.subtitle: The infrastructure that makes AI subscription secondary markets possible — secure, fast, global.

items.title: Zero-Knowledge Escrow
items.text: Trade compute capacity without ever exposing your private API keys or credentials. Every transaction is cryptographically isolated.

items.title: Instant Liquidity
items.text: Convert unused monthly subscription value into spendable credits in milliseconds. The secondary market is always open.

items.title: Global Scale
items.text: Access high-performance GPU clusters and frontier AI models from any region with sub-25ms median latency.

steps.title: Connect
steps.description: Link your AI provider accounts via secure OAuth or credit bridge. No credentials are stored in plaintext — ever.

steps.title: List
steps.description: Set your price and availability. Our zero-trust smart contract handles the escrow and settlement atomically.

steps.title: Earn
steps.description: Receive instant payouts in USDC or platform credits as your compute capacity is utilized across the network.

waitlist.title: Secure Your Spot
waitlist.subtitle: Join the waitlist to get early access to the market. Beta members receive lifetime 50% discount on platform fees.
waitlist.successText: We've added you to the private beta list. Keep an eye on your inbox for the invitation.

auth.signupSubtitle: Secure your identity on the market.

keys.label: Access Keys
keys.title: API Integration
keys.description: Your read-only market key. Paste a custom integration key from your AI provider below to link scribes directly to your account.
keys.customKeyPlaceholder: Paste your provider API key here (e.g. sk-...)
keys.rotateInitiated: Platform key rotation initiated. New key will be generated shortly.
keys.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this platform key? All active scribes using this key will be disconnected.

plans.label: Available Subscriptions
plans.secureLinkHint: Visa, Mastercard · Secure link sent to email
plans.bankTransferHint: Receive an invoice by email · 1–3 business days
plans.cryptoHint: BTC · XRP · USDC via Ethereum · 24 h activation

early_access.name: Early Access
early_access.desc: Community tier. Access the marketplace with limited scribe concurrency and public listings.

gpt4o.name: Early Access · ChatGPT
gpt4o.desc: Unlock GPT-4o scribes. Priority queue, extended context window, and commercial usage rights.

claude.name: Early Access · Claude AI
claude.desc: Unlock Claude Sonnet scribes. Superior reasoning and 200K token documents, fully managed.

perplexity.name: Early Access · Perplexity
perplexity.desc: Real-time web intelligence. Perplexity-powered scribes with live search augmentation.

history.label: Purchase History
history.empty: No purchases yet. Subscribe to a plan above to get started.

billing.label: Billing & Invoices
billing.empty: No invoices yet. Invoices are generated automatically 24h after each successful payment.

billing.error: Could not initiate payment. Please try again or contact support.
billing.redirecting: Redirecting to your email client for invoice request.

usage.label: API Usage · Per Scribe
usage.title: Monthly call distribution by provider
usage.inactive: Telemetry activates once your first scribe is initialised.

crypto.success: ✓ Proof submitted successfully. Access will be granted within 24 hours.
